title: stachys lamarckii
intro: Stachys lamarckii, also known as Betony, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive leaves and tubular flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys lamarckii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive discomfort. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
